signal.qualitative_note: AI optionality premium 13.9% ≤ 20%; AI investment appears proportionate to core business value (Assumption: ~60% of $131.8B TTM capex attributed to AI; 5× proxy multiple applied to AI capex run-rate of ~$79.1B)

timing.sue_caveat: 4-quarter std-dev is statistically weaker than the 8-quarter window used in the academic literature; treat SUE > 1.5 as the noise floor for v1.
timing.rationale: SUE 2.36 (Q1 2026 beat: +$1.13 vs consensus, +68.2%); PEAD IN WINDOW day 48/60 (late sub-band — drift signal decaying); revision direction N/A (yf MCP gap); ACT NOW unreachable without revision signal; estimated catalyst in 42d. Verdict could become ACT NOW once ABA-68 ships.

model.normalization_note: Clean TTM margin −1.64% breaks scenario ordering (negative FCF). User-selected normalized margin: OCF margin 19.46% minus normalized capex 9.0% (FY2023 pre-AI baseline) minus SBC 2.72% = 7.74%. Y1 anchor uses normalized margin; TTM fields preserved for audit.

bear.narrative: revenue miss, capex cycle extends, multiple compression, higher cost of capital

base.narrative: consensus revenue, AI capex normalises at 9% intensity, clean FCF expands linearly to steady state

bull.narrative: AWS + Ads outperform, capex decelerates faster than consensus, rate-easing tailwind

sensitivity.note: WACC dominates — ±100 bps WACC moves base IV by ±19%; terminal growth ±100 bps moves ±15%; CAGR ±300 bps moves ±10%

position_sizing.rationale: CAUTION × WITHIN BASE–BULL (price $264.14 vs base IV $176.6, MoS −33.1%) → 0% of portfolio (no entry). Coverage bypass preserves CAUTION verdict; position table caps CAUTION × WITHIN BASE–BULL at 0%.
